scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/config
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w packages/types && npm run lint -w packages/config
